sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UUID, name VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), 'Test Name');
UPDATE test_table SET name = 'Updated Name' WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM test_table LIMIT 1);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE id = (SELECT gen_random_uuid());
DELETE FROM test_table WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM test_table LIMIT 1);
